Game.Name: Aoki Densetsu Shoot! (Japan) (Beta)
Game.plot: Overview: Aoki Densetsu Shoot! is a soccer management and simulation game released on both the Super Nintendo and the Game Boy. Aoki Densetsu Shoot! was developed by Affect and published by Banpresto (Game Boy version) and KSS (Super Nintendo version). Aoki Densetsu Shoot! is based on an anime of the same name.
Game.Notes: Aoki Densetsu Shoot! (蒼き伝説 シュート!?, lit. "Blue Legend Shoot!") is a Japanese anime produced by Toei Animation between November 9, 1990 and December 22, 1991 on the Fuji TV television network; there were fifty-eight episodes. The game has an exhibition mode, an anime-style story mode, and a variety of options, which is entirely in Japanese, so literacy in this language is strongly recommended for quality gameplay. Once the game begins, the action progresses in a side view, similar to an arcade soccer game.
